title: streptanthus glandulosus subsp. pulchellus
intro: Streptanthus glandulosus subsp. pulchellus, also known as the Elegant Monkey Flower, is a rare and endangered plant species native to California, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and hairy stems. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may be beneficial in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Streptanthus glandulosus subsp. pulchellus include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, making it a potential natural remedy for various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a salve or infusion, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal properties and utilization in herbal remedies.
